action_text: Type "Incidents by agent" into the Reports list search field
rationale: Use the list’s own search to quickly locate the report titled "Incidents by agent" within the Global reports list

action_text: Press Enter in the Reports list search field to run the search
rationale: Execute the list search after entering the report title so the list filters to matching reports

action_text: Scroll up within the reports list to look for “Incidents by agent”
rationale: If the list is already sorted by Title, the target should appear near other “Incidents …” entries; scrolling slightly up may reveal “Incidents by agent” above “Incidents older than 7 days”

action_text: Click the Title column header to sort by Title
rationale: Ensure the list is alphabetically ordered by Title so that “Incidents by agent” appears in the expected position among “Incidents …” reports

action_text: Toggle the Show/Hide filter to open the list filter builder
rationale: If simple search doesn’t work, enabling the list filter builder allows adding a condition like Title contains “Incidents by agent”
